message:
Add trace integrity verification and type builders

New modules:
- trace/integrity.rs: Verify trace file integrity before replay
  - Header validation (magic, version, flags)
  - Metadata and schema verification
  - Event count and timeline monotonicity checks
  - Partial recovery support for corrupted files

- types/builder.rs: Builder patterns for complex types
  - Fluent API for configuration construction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
